query:
-- 备份SB-001-GRY的FOB价格数据
SELECT vp.* 
FROM variant_pricing vp
INNER JOIN product_variants pv ON vp.variantId = pv.id
INNER JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY';

-- 临时删除SB-001-GRY的FOB价格
UPDATE variant_pricing vp
INNER JOIN product_variants pv ON vp.variantId = pv.id
INNER JOIN products p ON pv.productId = p.id
SET vp.sellingPriceFobL1 = NULL,
    vp.sellingPriceFobL2 = NULL,
    vp.sellingPriceFobL3 = NULL
WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY';
